scripts.start: npm install && composer install && npm run build && wp-env start
scripts.dist: composer install --no-dev && gulp dist && composer install
scripts.zip: npm run dist && cd dist && zip -r bill-vektor.zip bill-vektor && cd ../
scripts.phpunit: composer install && wp-env run tests-cli --env-cwd='wp-content/themes/bill-vektor' vendor/bin/phpunit -c .phpunit.xml
